goal.statement: Reconcile shipped code changes into task and documentation state without mutating trackers before approval.
goal.definition_of_done: Changed files are indexed, stale references are reported, and all planned syncs are dry-run validated.

criteria: no external tracker mutation before approval

gates.plan_gate: Human reviews loop design and dry-run plan before execution.
gates.delivery_gate: All programmatic verifiers pass and human confirms no overclaim.

loop_control.no_progress_rule: Escalate when two consecutive runs produce the same unresolved blocker.

execution_boundary.mutation_policy: dry-run by default; mutation requires action-admit and human approval

privacy.egress_policy: No external model or tracker egress without explicit approval.
privacy.redaction_posture: Only file paths, commit SHAs, verifier summaries, and redacted logs are stored.
